opinion.h1: WHITNEY STORES, INC. v. SUMMERFORD, 393 U.S. 9 (1968)
opinion.h4: WHITNEY STORES, INC., ET AL. v. SUMMERFORD ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF SOUTH CAROLINA. No. 85. Decided October 14, 1968.
opinion.p: 393 U.S. 9 HORNBEAK v. HAMM, COMMISSIONER OF REVENUE FOR ALABAMA. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE MIDDLE DISTRICT OF ALABAMA. No. 260. Decided October 14, 1968.
MacDonald Gallion, Attorney General of Alabama, and Willard W. Livingston and Herbert I. Burson, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN, and MR. JUSTICE STEWARD are of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted and the case set for argument.
